prerequisites: An active Less Annoying CRM account with API access enabled (account admins can disable API key access for the whole account).
An API key created on the Programmer API settings page at https://account.lessannoyingcrm.com/app/Settings/Api. Keys cannot be retrieved after creation, so copy the key immediately.
A start date (start_date) marking the earliest record date from which to begin syncing.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with the api_key secret field. Less Annoying CRM issues a per-key API token from the Programmer API settings page, and the key is sent in the Authorization header on each request. Per-key permissions (read, create, edit, delete) can be customized when the key is created.

setupSteps.title: Create an API key in Less Annoying CRM
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your Less Annoying CRM account and open the Programmer API settings page at https://account.lessannoyingcrm.com/app/Settings/Api. Enable API access if it is not already on, then create a new API key. Grant it at least read permission so the connector can pull data. Copy the key right away because it is encrypted in storage and cannot be retrieved after creation.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key
setupSteps.body: Paste the generated key into the api_key field. This value is stored as a secret and is sent in the Authorization header with each API request to https://api.lessannoyingcrm.com/v2/.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Enter a start_date. The connector uses this date as the lower bound for the records it reads, syncing data on or after this point.

sources.title: Less Annoying CRM API v2 - Getting Started / Connect (authentication, API key generation, base URL)
